title: Optimization Craft
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b67589c2b7bf852e00c446c1c6cca038e2d922bf.png)
**An Overall Smoother Vanilla Based Minecraft Experience**
# Features
- High Fps (Sodium, Ferrite Core, Lithium)
- QoL Improvements (Mouse Tweaks, Status Effect Bars, Controlling)
- Immersion Tweaks (Wakes, Immersive UI, Better Clouds, Explosive Enhancement)
- Optional Resource Packs (Fresh Animations, Fresh Moves, Fancy Crops)
